benefits.name: Property Tax Exemption (100% P&T Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% permanent and total service-connected disability rating receive exemption on the first $45,000 of assessed property value.
benefits.notes: Exemption applies to principal dwelling and non-business property in same county.

benefits.name: Motor Vehicle Property Tax Exemption
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% P&T disability rating are exempt from personal property tax on one motor vehicle.
benefits.notes: One vehicle per veteran; must be registered and titled in North Carolina.

benefits.name: Military Retirement Income Tax Exclusion
benefits.description: Military retirement pay is fully exempt from North Carolina state income tax.
benefits.notes: Applies to all military retirement income from federal service.

benefits.name: Free Hunting and Fishing License
benefits.description: Veterans with 50% or higher service-connected disability rating receive a free lifetime hunting and fishing license.
benefits.notes: Lifetime license issued by NC Wildlife Resources Commission.

benefits.name: North Carolina National Guard Tuition Assistance
benefits.description: State tuition assistance for North Carolina National Guard members for higher education programs.
benefits.notes: Available for tuition and fees at approved NC institutions.

benefits.name: State Employment Preference
benefits.description: Veterans receive preference in North Carolina state civil service hiring.
benefits.notes: Preference applied by state hiring agencies.

benefits.name: Camp Lejeune Family and Veteran Recognition Program
benefits.description: Special services and recognition for Camp Lejeune-exposed veterans and families. Includes access to health screenings and support resources.
benefits.notes: North Carolina recognizes Camp Lejeune water contamination and provides dedicated support.

benefits.name: North Carolina Veterans Scholarship
benefits.description: Scholarships available for children of disabled or deceased veterans. Various programs through state and community colleges.
benefits.notes: Scholarships vary by institution; check with specific NC colleges for availability.
